english translation text: jab rida sar se chini mai sada deti rahi, tu na aaya ghaziWhen my veil was snatched, I kept calling but you did not come Ghazi (Hazrat Abbas a.s.)English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Jab rida sar se chini mai sada deti rahi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text: When my veil was snatched, I kept calling but you did not come Ghazi (Hazrat Abbas a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
aale imran kahan aur zindaa kahanye behan qaid hui tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
How can such honourable people of Ahlulbayt (a.s.) be put in prison,
Your sister was made captive but you did not come Ghazi

urdu transliteration text:
Jab rida sar se chini mai sada deti rahi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text: When my veil was snatched, I kept calling but you did not come Ghazi (Hazrat Abbas a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
humko pani na milay, teri khusboo to rahetere baazu na kate, chahe mashkeeza chidayye magar ho na saka, tere baazu hai judamujhpe hai tashalabi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Even if we don't get water, as long as your scent remains,
May your arms not be cut, even if the water-bag is pierced,
But that did not happen, your arms were severed,
And I am still thirsty, you did not come Ghazi...

urdu transliteration text:
Jab rida sar se chini mai sada deti rahi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text: When my veil was snatched, I kept calling but you did not come Ghazi (Hazrat Abbas a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
dhoop may tu tha shajar, tujhse aabaad tha gharhai barehna mera sar, kya nahi tujhko khabaray alamdare wafa, is behan ko ba-khudatujhse dhaaras thi badi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
You were our shade in the sun, our house was alive with you,
Now my veil has been snatched, do you not know,
Oh faithful Flag bearer (a.s.), by God, you were a pillar of strength for your sister, you did not come Ghazi...

urdu transliteration text:
Jab rida sar se chini mai sada deti rahi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text: When my veil was snatched, I kept calling but you did not come Ghazi (Hazrat Abbas a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
aagayi shame-alam, lutgaye ahle haramrayt par jalti huvi, hogaya thanda alampursa dene ke liye, mujhse milne ke liyeaagaye baba ali, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Now Sham e Ghariban has come, the Ladies of the Ahlul bayt have been looted,
On the burning sands, the Alam (flag) has fallen
To meet me & give condolences,
My father Ali (a.s.) has come, but you did not come Ghazi..

urdu transliteration text:
Jab rida sar se chini mai sada deti rahi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text: When my veil was snatched, I kept calling but you did not come Ghazi (Hazrat Abbas a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
kya kahoo sher mere, berida humko liyeye musalman saare, shehr dar shehr gayekhilqate koofa kabhi,  khilqate shaam kabhiaur haa hum pe hasi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
What shall I say my lion, these people have taken us without our veils, from town to town,
The people of Kufa & the people of Shaam laughed at us, but you did not come Ghazi..

urdu transliteration text:
Jab rida sar se chini mai sada deti rahi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text: When my veil was snatched, I kept calling but you did not come Ghazi (Hazrat Abbas a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
kitni bebas thi behan, ay shehenshahe wafanaam le le ke mera, jab ye zaalim ne kahanaaz tha jispe tujhe, ab bulao na usayaur mai roti rahi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
How helpless was your sister, oh King of loyalty,
When the tyrant kept calling my name and said, the one who you were so proud of, call him now,
And I kept crying, but you did not come Ghazi...

urdu transliteration text:
Jab rida sar se chini mai sada deti rahi, tu na aaya ghazi
@HujjatELC
english translation text: When my veil was snatched, I kept calling but you did not come Ghazi (Hazrat Abbas a.s.)
